name: evergraytech-com
description: The EverGray Tech marketing website — evergraytech.com

scripts.sync:design-system: mkdir -p vendor/design-system && cp node_modules/@evergraytech/design-system/dist/variables.css vendor/design-system/ && cp node_modules/@evergraytech/design-system/dist/logo.svg vendor/design-system/ && echo 'Design system assets synced to vendor/design-system/'
